ul.li: The maximum password age is 90 days.
Password once changed can only be updated after a minimum of one day.

While logging into the application, if you enter a wrong password five times, your account gets locked out, as you cross the maximum failed attempts allowed. After the last failed login attempt, your account stays locked out for 15 minutes.
